title: clinopodium betulifolium
intro: Clinopodium betulifolium, also known as Bee Balm or Betula-leaved Clinopodium, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clinopodium betulifolium include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Clinopodium betulifolium can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a variety of ways to harness its medicinal properties.
